title: Karnaugh Map (K-map) Simplification Process
description: A visual diagram showing the step-by-step process of using a Karnaugh Map to simplify a Boolean function, from truth table to minimized SOP expression.
elements: Truth Table with Input Variables and Output
Adjacent '1's Grouped with Loops (Pairs, Quads, Octets)
Minimized Product Terms from Each Group
relationships: Truth Table outputs are transferred to corresponding K-map cells
Adjacent '1's on the K-map are encircled to form groups
Each group corresponds to a simplified product term where variables that change within the group are eliminated
The final expression is the sum (OR) of all the identified product terms
